case_title: WOOD, JOHN DAVID VS PG & E / SAN FRANCISCO DIV.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $979.18 FILED BY WOOD, JOHN DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT PG & E / SAN FRANCISCO DIV. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO PG&E RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO NOV-19-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOD, JOHN DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PG & E / SAN FRANCISCO DIV. $797.18 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $816.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER RECEIVED FROM JOHN WOOD AND SENT TO JUDGE HOFF REGARDING AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOOD, JOHN DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PG & E / SAN FRANCISCO DIV. $979.18 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $998.97, JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC AS OF NOV. 22, 1993 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
